commit.message:
fix: pular indicadores toda-NaN em calcular_dimensoes (gerar_pagina)

Mesmo fix aplicado em gerar_caso_controle.py: se median() de um
indicador for NaN (coluna toda ausente), ignora o indicador em vez
de contaminar o score da dimensão com NaN.

Corrige IVS=NaN no Betim causado por D2_fora_creche e D2_fora_fund
ausentes. index-betim.html regenerado com 42/42 UBS com IVS válido.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve mypy type errors in CI

- Fix Optional param types in compliance_tools.py (str → str | None)
- Fix _paginate variable type in graph_client.py
- Add mypy config to pyproject.toml (ignore agent.py Azure SDK type issues)
- Add types-requests and verify.py to CI mypy check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix weather export: use off-screen DOM clone with real browser reflow

html2canvas onclone doesn't trigger proper CSS reflow, so children stay
at their mobile-rendered sizes. New approach: deep-clone the report
element, place it off-screen at 1600x1000px with weather-export-mode
class, wait for two animation frames so the browser fully reflows all
children at desktop dimensions, then capture with html2canvas and remove.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(spreads): extract classifyRowKind to prevent client-code import in server pipeline

v2Adapter.ts (server-only) was importing classifyRowKind from
SpreadTable.tsx (a React "use client" component), pulling client-side
code into the server pipeline and crashing the spreads/standard route.

Extract classifyRowKind + SpreadRowKind into a standalone pure TS file
at src/lib/financialSpreads/standard/classifyRowKind.ts. Both
v2Adapter.ts and SpreadTable.tsx now import from there.

commit.message:
Force desktop layout via inline styles on cloned DOM for weather export

CSS class approach was unreliable — html2canvas doesn't fully re-compute
responsive styles. Now directly sets inline styles on the cloned DOM
elements (container, grid, columns, forecast, moon/sun, stat boxes,
day names) to guarantee desktop landscape layout at 1600x1000 (3200x2000
at scale 2) regardless of device viewport.

Fix weather export: set windowWidth/height to activate lg: breakpoints

html2canvas renders using the original viewport dimensions, so Tailwind
lg: classes never activated on mobile. Setting windowWidth:1600 and
windowHeight:1000 makes the cloned DOM render as if on a wide screen,
plus width/height force the canvas to 1600x1000.

commit.message:
feat(regime): complete P1 adaptive switching — SMC overlay + volatility guard

P1.1 — detect_market_regime(): when smc_strategy is warmed up, call
  analyze_with_smc(df, smc_ctx) instead of analyze(df) so ACCUMULATION /
  DISTRIBUTION phases detected by CHoCH are reflected in live routing.
  Falls back to analyze(df) when SMC context is absent or not yet warmed up.

P1.3 — _update_active_strategies(): add volatility guard that blocks strategy
  expansion (adding new strategies) when atr_pct > _MAX_VOLATILITY_ATR_PCT (3%).
  Reductions (deactivations) always pass so open positions are still managed.
  New class constant: BotOrchestrator._MAX_VOLATILITY_ATR_PCT = 3.0

Tests: 4 new tests in test_market_regime.py (78 total, all passing).

chore: add staging branch workflow (#139) (#140)

* chore: add staging branch workflow (#139)

Add staging as an intermediate branch between feature branches and main.
PRs now target staging for batch testing before a single production deploy.

- CI triggers on pushes/PRs to both main and staging
- E2E tests run on push to both main and staging
- CLAUDE.md updated with new branch workflow docs

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add promote-staging workflow with CI + deploy guards (#141)

Adds a manually triggered workflow that verifies CI and Vercel deployment
status on staging before merging to main. Prevents promoting broken builds.

Guards:
- CI must have passed on the latest staging commit
- Vercel deployment must have succeeded (or be absent)
- Uses --ff-only merge to keep history clean
- Auto-resets staging to main after promotion

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Railway auto-deploy via deploy hook on python/ changes

- New workflow: deploy-railway.yml triggers on push to main when python/**
  changes, POSTs to RAILWAY_DEPLOY_HOOK secret to redeploy the ML service
- Updated retrain.yml: also pings deploy hook after committing new model
  files so Railway loads the fresh model immediately
- Both workflows are no-ops if RAILWAY_DEPLOY_HOOK secret is not set

Setup: Railway service → Settings → Deploy Triggers → Add Trigger → copy
URL → add as RAILWAY_DEPLOY_HOOK in GitHub repo secrets.

commit.message:
fix(spreads): extract all active docs, remove T12 doc types, add OCR fallback (#172)

1. docTypeToSpreadTypes: Remove T12/TRAILING_12 as input doc types —
   bankers don't collect these as document types.

2. extractFactsFromDocument: Remove T12/TRAILING_12 from income
   statement extractor check. Add OCR fallback to document_extracts
   when document_ocr_results is empty (bridges Gemini OCR pipeline).

3. spreadsProcessor: Replace single-doc + heartbeat-fallback extraction
   with always-extract-all-active-docs. source_document_id is unreliable
   after job merging — extracting from one doc while ignoring the rest
   causes MISSING fact_type across TAX_RETURN, BALANCE_SHEET, etc.

commit.message:
Replace Web Speech API TTS with OpenAI TTS (two distinct voices)

- Add OpenAI API key field in Settings (stored in localStorage)
- openAITTS() helper fetches audio/speech with tts-1 model, returns Audio element
- Examiner voices (ep, ep2, eq2): onyx (deep male)
- Candidate speech voices (sa, app): nova (female)
- startWordReveal() replaces onboundary for time-based word reveal
- Abort flags prevent race conditions when skip/back pressed mid-fetch
- Full Web Speech API fallback when no OpenAI key is set

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: defer diff loading until file selection to fix freeze on large repos

Stop auto-fetching the combined diff of all files when entering the
Changes tab. Instead, start with an empty diff panel showing "Select a
file to view its diff" and load diffs on-demand per file click. This
eliminates UI freezes in repos with 1000+ changed files.

commit.message:
Add 4-voice polyphony with 14 chord types

4-voice polyphony for both MIDI (chord playing with voice stealing)
and Free Run (harmonic interval stacking) modes. Per-voice state
includes independent phase, envelope, masking, and DC filter.

14 chord types for Free Run: Unison, Octaves, Fifths, Sub+Oct,
Major, Minor, Maj7, Min7, Sus4, Dom7, Dim, Aug, Power, Open5th.
MIDI mode uses LRU voice allocation with 3-tier priority (retrigger,
free voice, steal oldest). Volume normalized by voice count param.

Button 3 cycles voice count, Button 4 cycles chord type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
